posts.author: Kellie272 (Kellie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would love the ability to mark a notification as unread. Currently when I check notifications all are immediately marked as read and the notification bubble goes away. I want to be able to keep the bubble as there are notifications I need to address but don’t have time right now, but since the bubble disappears I forget about them

What are you trying to achieve

Manually mark notifications as unread so I can keep the notification bubble
